# Nya (its_nya_music)

> Nya is a hyperpop artist from Germany, rapping and singing in German and English. The debut album NYAVERSE is released on July 24, 2026 (self-released, 13 tracks).

## Main pages

- [Official link hub](https://itsnyamusic.com/links/): all official profiles and streaming links
- [NYAVERSE album page](https://itsnyamusic.com/nyaverse/): debut album details, cover and full tracklist
- [Promo site](https://itsnyamusic.com/promo/): bio, discography and videos
- [Bandcamp](https://itsnyamusic.bandcamp.com/): buy and download music, including the NYAVERSE album at https://itsnyamusic.bandcamp.com/album/nyaverse

## Key facts

- Artist name: Nya. Handle on all platforms: its_nya_music
- Debut album: NYAVERSE, out July 24, 2026, self-released, 13 tracks in German and English
- Guest features on NYAVERSE: Naeyiwu, Mhhh7887, Vain
- Earlier releases: 3 EPs and 15+ singles since 2020, including Messer (2026), Denk Wieder an Dich (2026), BEDWARS (2025), Sweet Monster Energy (2025)

## Canonical identifiers

- Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/611pv3ZS2T5iLg7k9tDrgS
- Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/artist/1369849403
- Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q135998061
- MusicBrainz: https://musicbrainz.org/artist/d4983c1c-e81d-4548-85d8-056d5e23855a
- Bandcamp: https://itsnyamusic.bandcamp.com/
- Genius: https://genius.com/artists/Nya-its-nya-music
- Discogs: https://www.discogs.com/artist/17612289-Nya-15
